_description: Default overnight sweep for the variant classifier. Designed around the data point that val@1=0.498 was reached with hidden_dim=512, dropout=0.4, feat_dropout=0.1, wd=1e-3, ls=0.15. That run was overfitting (train@1=0.88) so most of these experiments push regularization harder, explore capacity both up and down, try the alternate sampler, and verify the top configs with different seeds. ~30 experiments * ~25-45 min each = ~15-20 hours total. Edit freely — only 'name' is required per entry.

_notes.finetuned_backbone: Path is relative to the project root (where you run `python training/sweep_variant_classifier.py`). Change if your checkpoint lives elsewhere.
_notes.resume: Re-running the sweep skips names already marked 'completed' in results.csv. Delete a row to re-run that experiment.
_notes.naming_scheme: <group>_<axis>_<variant> — groups: baseline, reg_* (regularization), cap_* (capacity), sampler_*, seed_* (seed verification).

experiments.name: baseline_linear_hierarchical
experiments._why: Linear probe with hierarchical training — quick floor check.

experiments.name: baseline_mlp512_d4_fd1_wd1e-3_ls15
experiments._why: Recreate the current best result as a sweep row for easy comparison.

experiments.name: reg_mlp512_d5_fd15_wd2e-3_ls15
experiments._why: Push regularization past the current best to chase the train/val gap.

experiments.name: reg_mlp512_d5_fd2_wd3e-3_ls2
experiments._why: Aggressive regularization — expect smaller gap, maybe lower val@1.

experiments.name: reg_mlp512_d6_fd25_wd3e-3_ls2
experiments._why: Even heavier dropout — is there a cliff?

experiments.name: reg_mlp512_d3_fd05_wd5e-4_ls1
experiments._why: Lighter regularization — confirms the current best isn't over-regularized.

experiments.name: cap_mlp256_d4_fd1_wd1e-3_ls15
experiments._why: Smaller MLP — does less capacity help the gap?

experiments.name: cap_mlp768_d5_fd15_wd2e-3_ls15
experiments._why: Bigger MLP with proportional regularization.

experiments.name: cap_mlp1024_d5_fd2_wd3e-3_ls2
experiments._why: Widest MLP, heaviest regularization — capacity ceiling check.

experiments.name: sampler_cb_mlp512_d5_fd15_wd2e-3
experiments._why: Class-balanced sampler — should lift rare-class F1, maybe lower val@1.

experiments.name: sampler_cb_linear
experiments._why: Class-balanced with a linear head — cheap rare-class-only probe.

experiments.name: sampler_random_mlp512
experiments._why: Random sampler — confirms set_stratified is actually helping.

experiments.name: sched_cosine_mlp512
experiments._why: Plain cosine instead of warm restarts — does the LR dip help or hurt?

experiments.name: sched_wr_t3_mlp512
experiments._why: Tighter warm-restart cycles (T_0=3 instead of 5).

experiments.name: lr_high_mlp512
experiments._why: Higher LR (3e-3) — sometimes escapes overfitting plateau.

experiments.name: lr_low_mlp512
experiments._why: Lower LR (3e-4) with more epochs — slow-and-steady convergence.

experiments.name: long_mlp512_d5_fd15_wd2e-3
experiments._why: Long run (200 epochs) on a regularized config to find the true ceiling.

experiments.name: k16_mlp512_d4_fd1
experiments._why: Wider per-batch set coverage (k=16) — more cross-set gradient mass.

experiments.name: k4_mlp512_d4_fd1
experiments._why: Tighter per-batch set focus (k=4) — more within-set gradient.

experiments.name: seed_A_mlp512_best
experiments._why: Seed verification for the best regularized config (seed 17).

experiments.name: seed_B_mlp512_best
experiments._why: Seed verification (seed 2024).
